reasoning: Lactate clearance is a key limiter for you, as seen in the significant drop from your 5-minute to 20-minute power. Last ride showed you were operating below your potential power, highlighting that we can push harder. These over-unders will directly aid your performance on the Alpine Loop's main climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Do 6x5-minute sets: 2 minutes at 209W, 2 minutes at 249W, 1 minute recovery at 201W.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
